name: kesha-voice-kit
title: Kesha Voice Kit
description: Offline speech-to-text and text-to-speech, powered by the Kesha Voice Kit CLI. No API keys, no cloud — runs locally on Apple Silicon.
author: drakulavich

commands.name: transcribe-selected-file
commands.title: Transcribe Selected Audio
commands.subtitle: Kesha Voice Kit
commands.description: Transcribe the audio file selected in Finder. Opens a detail view with the transcript + detected language; one keystroke copies it to the clipboard.

commands.name: speak-clipboard
commands.title: Speak Clipboard
commands.subtitle: Kesha Voice Kit
commands.description: Synthesize speech from the current clipboard text and play it through the default output. English and Russian auto-routed; falls back to macOS system voices when AVSpeech is available.

preferences.name: keshaBinPath
preferences.title: `kesha` binary path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the `kesha` CLI. Leave blank to use PATH (default).

preferences.name: defaultVoice
preferences.title: Default voice (Speak Clipboard)
preferences.description: Voice id passed to `kesha say --voice`. Leave blank to let Kesha auto-route by detected language.
